chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 35 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case For hearing of main case 29.04.2024 None present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on last date of hearing. Accordingly, this transfer application is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Abdul Basit
